item.title: Busuyi Guitar 4 String Bass 6 String Lead Acoustic, Double Neck l Acoustic Guitar with Classical Metal Heel — $399
item.description:
$399 · Mint · Asi's Gear Depot

Double neck sleek guitar classical metal heel41" cutaway bass guitar, 39" acoustic guitar, double-sided neck guitar, Okuma headstock, spruce plywood sides, black walnut fingerboard, bridge, body with black binding, fingerboard with black binding, white fret, 2 classic acoustic purple rosettes, round head plastic column, nickel covered machine head, 2 eq.

Whether you are a beginner or a professional player, this is a wonderful choice for yourself or your children, families, or your friends.

??? ??? Specifications:

?€? Color: Black

?€? Size: Full-Size 41inch Cutaway  

?€? Hand Orientation: Right-Hand

?€? Body Material: Solid Wood

?€? Back Material: Basswood

?€? Fretboard Material: Rosewood

?€? Number of Strings: 10

?€? Item Weight: 9.2 Pounds

??? ??? Why Sleek Guitar' Brand?

We are always here

Every music lover can simply come with us if there is any trouble with SLEEK GUITAR You also can simply return it for a replacement or full refund if there is any trouble with the sleek guitar.

??? ??? More About Sleek Guitar?

???The classical guitar features a handcrafted wooden construction with solid wood body, birchwood headstock, rosewood fretboard, high gloss polished body and back w/ protective binding, rosette linden laminate finish, chrome tuner pegs

???Top class body with black binding, finger provides a smooth combines comfort and performance with double-sided neck shaped profile sleek guitar bass kit is suitable for various playing styles.

???Professionally optimized arched back design, the backboard radian emits refraction to the sound buffer, gaining greater volume, increasing resonance, and improving sound quality make the sound clearer three-dimensional feeling stronger.

???Top class body with black binding, finger provides a smooth combines comfort and performance with double-sided neck shaped profile sleek guitar bass kit is suitable for various playing styles.

 ??? A great gift for a party, festival day, and birthday! classical string, the best choice for your carry out and trip. And can make beautiful music, it is a good choice as a gift, can be given to family, friends as gifts for Christmas, New Year, birthday, etc.

item.title: 4 String Short Scale Neck Through Bass/6 String Tremolo Busuyi Double Sided, Headless Guitar — $375
item.description:
$375 · Mint · Asi's Gear Depot

  • Tremolo Bridge
  • Headless Bass & Guitar model
  • NeckThru Bass
  • Double sides, dual jack
  • Maplewood fretboard
  • Short Scale bass, fun to play
  • Buy here, its $1,128.00 on eBay
  • Join style: set neck( neck through body)
  • body: basswood wood
  • neck: maple wood
  • fingerboard radium: 13 inch
  • fingerboard: maple neck
  • truss rod: double adjust
  • pickups: passive pickups.
  • control : 1V. 1T.1-3 way toggle one jack output.(guitar side)
  • . 1V.2T. one jack out put.(bass side)
  • bridge: headless bridge( guitar and bass)
  • scale length 648mm for guitar.
  • 864mm for bass.

    ???Top class body with black binding, finger provides a smooth combines comfort and performance with double-sided neck shaped profile sleek guitar bass kit is suitable for various playing styles.

    ???Professionally optimized arched back design, the backboard radian emits refraction to the sound buffer, gaining greater volume, increasing resonance, and improving sound quality make the sound clearer three-dimensional feeling stronger.

    ???Whether you are a beginner or a professional player, this is a wonderful choice as a gift to yourself or your children, families, or your friends.

    What??s better than spending quality time with friends?

    ???Play A song

    A relaxed campfire atmosphere on a warm summer evening. It's Friday night and your friends want to hang out. "Hey, pass me the Busuyi Guitar!" That's how every good evening starts. No sooner said than done! You hand over your Busuyi Guitar and they play one classic after the other to which everyone can sing along loudly. Followed by the songs where everyone is suddenly quiet and just listens with tears in their eyes and lost in memories.

item.title: Fender Deluxe Zone Bass Made in Mexico 2001-2006 - Metallic Gray — $350
item.description:
$350 · Good · Rohan's Shop

Selling my Fender Zone Bass (MIM). This model is discontinued and has become pretty sought‑after because of the active electronics and PJ setup.

Condition: • Fully functional • Neck is straight, truss rod works • Frets in good shape • Electronics clean, no crackle • Active preamp works perfectly • Normal cosmetic wear for its age, including a small chip on the body (purely cosmetic)

Features: • Active 2‑band EQ • P/J pickup configuration • String‑through‑body bridge • Comfortable neck profile • Made in Mexico (2001–2006 production)

Why this bass is valuable: • Discontinued model • Sells $600–$900 online • Known for punchy tone and versatility

Price: $350 for fast sale today

Local pickup in Akron. Can deliver for a fee.

2 Magnet humbucker pickups, Roeswood fret-board with 22 frets, 5 String Bass/12 String Lead
Double Neck Busuyi Guitar

Classic bass pick up, delivers classic tone with all the warmth and crisp, clear sound, always the first choice for bass players. A great gift for party, festival day and birthday! item.title: Music Man Stingray Tim Commerford Short Scale Active Bass Guitar — $3,639.85
item.description:
$3,639.85 · Very Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

Here for sale we have No.14 of 50 Music Man Tim Commerford Short Scale Active Stingray electric bass in Gloss Natural finish. This bass features an Ash body, bolt-on Maple neck and 22 fret Maple fingerboard. Other appointments include Custom MusicMan tuning machines and string-thru-body bridge with adjustable mutes for each string. A single humbucker with neodymium magnets if fitted next to a finger ramp. This is wired to active electronics that include a master volume and a 3-band EQ.


The Maple neck plays very well, with a profile that might be described as a moderately-sized 'C' shape which sits comfortably in the hand and provides a smooth and responsive playing experience across the register. The Satin finish to the rear assists with slick navigation of the 30" scale, and along with the generous cutaways ensures that access to the upper frets is a breeze. 


Since their introduction in 1976, StingRay basses have been sought after by players for their distinctive tonal character. There is a deep and rich low end growl, with punchy mids and a snappy treble response which blends perfectly into a wide range of musical settings; filling out the low end of the mix and capturing all the attack and sparkle of your playing. The on-board active preamp offers comprehensive control of your sound, with 3-band EQ and master volume controls which allow you to dial in your perfect tone right on the instrument. 


Brand- Ernie Ball Music Man 

Model- Stingray Tim Commerford Short Scale Active

Finish- Gloss Natural

Made In- USA

Body- Ash

Neck- Maple

Fingerboard- Maple

Frets- 22

Scale Legnth- 30"

Nut Width- 1.5"

Pickups- Single humbucker with neodymium magnets

Controls- Volume, treble, mid, bass


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1210626217872

Weight: 8lbs  

Serial: 14 of 50


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall excellent condition, it is difficult to discern any markings to the headstock.

Neck: Overall excellent condition, some light tooling marks are apparent at the bass side fret ends of 11 & 12. These are smooth to the touch.

Body: Overall very good condition, the rear face demonstrates light indentations to the lower bout, piercing the finish slightly. Any other markings are difficult to discern from the natural gloss finish.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate minimal signs of use.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (spoke wheel) included.

Hardware: Excellent condition. Locking strap components included. Scratching is visible to the scratchplate.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.


Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2mm - Bass 2.5mm


Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Electrics: Fully functional.


Case & Accessories

Ernie Ball MM Hard case

The case demonstrates light signs of use. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Ken Lawrence Chamberbrase II 5 string electric bass guitar LED's — $5,490
item.description:
$5,490 · Excellent · Tari 's Gear Bazaar

This bass is incredible in every way. A true work of art. It plays with ease The tone is sublime and beautiful. Even unplugged, the bass has a gorgeous sound. It is very comfortable and well balanced as well.




Macassar ebony top and headstock laminate,


Brazilian Rosewood fingerboard, Gabon Ebony binding, Paua shell block inlays and logo,


Blue LEDs side position markers,


Nordstrand ”split J” PUPs,


Glockenklang pre amp with Tara labs wiring


Hipshot hardware


17.5 mm spacing,


34" scale.


8 Lbs, 15 ounces.


Comes with Mono Case as pictured.




Pro packing and insured shipping.

item.title: Fender Aerodyne Precision Bass 2006 - Transparent Red Flame Maple — $1,280.84
item.description:
$1,280.84 · Good · GeetarSean

A stunning 2006 Fender Aerodyne Precision Bass finished in Transparent Red over a beautifully figured flame maple top. Made in Japan during the highly regarded CIJ era, the Aerodyne series combines classic Fender tone with modern styling, featuring a lightweight carved body, cream binding and a slim Jazz Bass neck for exceptional comfort and playability. The Aerodyne Precision pairs a traditional Precision split-coil with a Jazz Bass bridge pickup, delivering everything from deep, punchy low end to articulate, growling bridge tones.

This example has been upgraded with Aguilar pickups, offering improved clarity, definition and output while retaining the classic Fender character. It is in excellent overall condition with only light signs of use, has been professionally checked and set up, and is ready to play.

Specifications:

  • 2006 Fender Aerodyne Precision Bass
  • Made in Japan (CIJ)
  • Transparent Red Flame Maple Top
  • Lightweight carved body with cream binding
  • Matching transparent red headstock
  • Slim Jazz Bass neck profile
  • Rosewood fingerboard
  • Upgraded Aguilar PJ pickup set
  • Master Volume
  • Pickup Blend
  • Master Tone
  • Chrome hardware
  • 34” scale length

✅ Professionally Checked & Setup
🚚 Secure UK-Wide Shipping Available
🔄 Part Exchange & Trade-In Options Available

item.title: Fender Performer 2021 - White — $1,350
item.description:
$1,350 · Very Good · The Bass Worx

This instrument is in top shape. Everything functions right down to the grease bucket circuit sounds great plays great no issues whatsoever the truss rod works fine no alterations

item.title: Status S2 Classic 6 string headless bass — $2,750
item.description:
$2,750 · Very Good · David's G.A.S. Works

Status S2 6 string bass with graphite neck. In very good plus condition with Hiscox hard shell case.

I’ll throw in another set of strings. Great bass, everything works, I’m just kind of more of a meat and potatoes player and the sixth string is wasted on me, cool as it is to do chordal stuff more easily.

The hard shell case has one slight crack on it, which I view as the case doing its purpose on this planet and there's a surface level crack in neck pocket. Both are minor IMO and pictured for full transparency, I went out of my way to highlight the crack so took in direct light otherwise you’d be just as likely to not even see it - I didn’t initially.


  • Serial Number: 03073290
  • Origin: England
  • Year: 2007
  • Body Material: Mahogany, flame maple
  • Colour: Natural
  • Finish: Satin
  • Neck Finish: Gloss
  • Neck Material: Carbon fibre
  • Fingerboard: Phenolic resin
  • Inlays: Side dots
  • Pickups: Status
  • Electronics: Status
  • Controls: Pickup pan, volume, bass, middle, treble, mid switch
  • Pickguard: N/A
  • Hardware: Black
  • Gig Bag/Case: Hardcase
  • Accessories: N/A
  • Frets: 24
  • String Spacing: 18mm
  • Nut Width: 54mm
  • Scale Length: 34”

item.title: Gibson EB-3 Bass Guitar 1968 - Cherry — $2,175
item.description:
$2,175 · Very Good · john's Gear Outlet

1968 Gibson EB-3 bass guitar.SN#888550 ( the second 8 might be a 9, either way 1968). Classic short scale 60s bass. Standard wear as far as beltwear on the back , some scratches and crazing but everything is exactly as photographed so none of it is easy to see.Standard pitting on tuning keys. It is missing the resting bar on the pickguard, the cover over the bridge pickup and one tiny cover on back over the D tuning machine. The bass is ready to play. The case is a 60s hardshell with standard wear. All latches work. No case key.
